# SEO Visibility Baseline

Use this baseline for organic visibility recovery plans.

## Core Moves

1. Cluster content by search intent, not by internal org chart.
2. Prioritize pages with ranking movement potential before net-new topics.
3. Tie each article to a measurable conversion path.
